_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-29 16:17:51Z)**_

This change adds only a static `vessel` string field to hardcoded seed data arrays inside a mockup React component (`docs/vercel_mockup/src/MOCKUP.jsx`). The values are literal strings, not derived from user input or any external source, and they flow into client-side render of a sales-reports demo screen.

No new entry points, sinks, validators, allowlists, IaC, CI triggers, or auth checks are introduced. The diff is purely a data-shape extension for a UI mockup. No security-relevant flows are affected.
